nasb.text: Then Eli answered and said, “Go in peace; and may the God of Israel grant your petition that you have asked of Him.”

esv.text: Then Eli answered, “Go in peace, and the God of Israel grant your petition that you have made to him.”

cnv.text: 以利回答：“平平安安回去吧！願以色列的　神把你向他所求的賜給你。”

ccb.text: 以利说：“你安心地回去吧，愿以色列的上帝答应你的祈求。”
